CustomField.formula: IF( OR( ISBLANK( mfg_Batches_Per_Day__c ), mfg_Batches_Per_Day__c <= 0, ISBLANK( mfg_Batch_Size__c ), mfg_Batch_Size__c <= 0 ), 0, FLOOR(mfg_Batches_Per_Day__c * mfg_Batch_Size__c ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Calculates the total number of units that can be produced in a day based on batches per day and batch size. Only complete units are counted, and the value defaults to zero if inputs are missing or invalid.
CustomField.label: Daily Capacity (Units Per Day)
